errors.fallback: Unable to send reset instructions right now.

EMAIL_NOT_FOUND.body: No account is registered with this email. Check the spelling or create a new account.

OAUTH_ONLY.body: This email is registered with Google or Microsoft sign-in. We sent instructions to your inbox.

ACCOUNT_DISABLED.body: This email is registered, but the account is disabled. Contact support if you need help.

RATE_LIMITED.body: This email is registered, but you've requested too many resets. Try again in an hour.

notConfiguredMessage.microsoft: Copy mobile/.env.example to mobile/.env and set EXPO_PUBLIC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID. For API mode, also configure backend OAuth in application-local.yml (see README).

contractSummary.title: Contract summary
contractSummary.subtitle: Review and edit after parsing — click Save as contract summary to persist to the database.
contractSummary.documentSubtitle: AI classified this PDF and summarized the full document. Edit if needed, then save.
contractSummary.sectionSubtitle: Upload PDF, Word, Excel, and other documents, or summarize from email attachments. AI detects document type — contracts get structured terms; other files get a full summary.
contractSummary.timeoutFailed: Reading this scanned PDF timed out. For large files, wait and retry or compress the PDF first.
contractSummary.fileTooLarge: This file exceeds the upload limit (50 MB max). Scanned PDFs are often large — try compressing the file first.
contractSummary.networkFailed: Could not reach the server. Check that the backend is running and your network connection.
contractSummary.scannedPdfUnavailable: Could not read text from this scanned PDF. Install Tesseract with Chinese (chi_sim), or configure a vision-capable AI model.
contractSummary.saveContractBlockedHint: Confirm terms and create the deal before saving a contract summary.
contractSummary.deleteDocumentConfirmMessage: This removes the saved document summary for this email. This cannot be undone.
contractSummary.deleteContractConfirmMessage: This removes the saved contract summary. This cannot be undone.
contractSummary.missingThread: Open this message from the inbox thread before summarizing the contract.

aiRulesCalloutBody.both: This thread was classified and summarized with keyword rules. Budget, deliverables, and risks may be incomplete until LLM is available.
aiRulesCalloutBody.classification: This thread was classified with keyword rules. Category and value band may differ from LLM results.
aiRulesCalloutBody.brief: This brief was built with keyword rules. Budget, deliverables, and usage rights may be incomplete.

trainingDesc.commercial: Similar threads from {{brand}} surface in Today.

trainingDesc.other: Future unclear threads stay in Other.

inboxThreadDetail.footerCommercial: Reply emails won't send until you approve.
inboxThreadDetail.proposalCreateHint: Create a formal proposal from this opportunity and package.
inboxThreadDetail.confirmDangerIntro: These terms may need extra care. Confirm you have read:
inboxThreadDetail.confirmBriefErrorBody: Please review the brief, quote stage, and risk acknowledgements, then try again.

confirmBriefErrors.BRIEF_NOT_COMPLETE: Wait until the structured brief finishes extracting, then try again.
confirmBriefErrors.LEAD_STAGE_TOO_EARLY: Send or approve a quote email first so this thread reaches the quoted stage.
confirmBriefErrors.NOT_FOUND: This opportunity is no longer available. Refresh the inbox and try again.

confirmBlocker.brief_pending: Wait for the structured brief to finish extracting before confirming terms.
confirmBlocker.lead_stage_early: Draft a reply email from this thread (use AI to pick quote follow-up, etc.), approve it, then confirm terms.
confirmBlocker.lead_stage_draft_ready: Open your reply email, save it to your mailbox, and send it. Saving to drafts alone does not mark this as quoted.
confirmBlocker.danger_risks: High-risk terms will be shown when you continue.

emailAttachments.title: {{count}} attachments
emailAttachments.previewFailed: Could not load attachment preview. Reconnect {{email}} in Inbox Setup, then try again.

rankingExplain.a11y: See why this deal is ordered here in your inbox

explain.title: Why it's ranked here
explain.subtitle: Quote, brand fit, timeline, and risk combined

urgency.generic: Time or reply pressure — needs attention first.
urgency.needsReply: They're waiting for a reply (activity in the last {{hours}} hours).

value.needsWork: Quote {{quote}} — not strong enough for high value yet.
value.p3: Non-commercial or archived — no quote evaluation.

match.unavailable: Not enough fit signals — quote drives most of the ranking.

risk.high: Terms risk: worth a closer look

order.p0: Urgent threads always rank above other deals.
order.byHeadroom: Within this tier: headroom first ({{headroom}} here), then fit & risk.
order.byShortfall: Within this tier: shortfall vs floor first (−{{shortfall}} here), then fit & risk.
order.even: Within this tier: even with floor — fit & risk break ties.
order.fallback: Without a clear quote, ranked behind deals with known budgets in the same tier.

package.best: Multiple options — ranking uses "{{deliverable}}" ({{quote}}) for most headroom.
package.bestUnnamed: Multiple options — ranking uses "{{deliverable}}" for most headroom.

explain.footnoteDefaultFloor: Some deliverables weren't on your rate card — default floor used.
explain.footnoteNoRateCard: No rate card yet — default floor used.

plain.title: How inbox ranking works
plain.subtitle: Tier rules, quote comparison, and order within tier
plain.sectionQuote: ② How the quote was scored

reason.p0: P0 triggers: deadline within 48h, contract risk, or they're waiting for a recent reply. Quote size doesn't matter — P0 sits at the top.
reason.p1: The quote meets or exceeds your rate-card target, so this is P1 (high value) and ranks ahead of P2/P3.
reason.p2: The quote falls in your floor–target range, or details aren't strong enough for high value yet — P2 (review later).
reason.p2Negotiate: Quote is below floor, budget is unclear, or deliverables don't fully match your rate card — ranks behind deals with clearer high quotes.
reason.p3: Non-commercial, marketing, or unrelated mail — P3 (low priority).
reason.default: Tier is set from thread content, your rate-card range, and urgency signals.

plain.quoteWithFloor: They quoted about {{quote}}; your combined floor is about {{floor}}, {{marginPhrase}}.
plain.quoteNeedsWork: The quote isn't clear enough yet, or doesn't meet your high-value line.

order.p0: P0 always ranks above P1–P3; within P0, recent activity breaks ties.
order.marginPositive: Primary sort within tier: headroom (quote − combined floor) — more headroom ranks higher.
order.marginNegative: Primary sort within tier: shortfall below floor — smaller gap ranks higher.
order.marginUnknown: Without a clear quote, headroom can't be computed — ranks behind deals with known budgets.
order.brandStrong: Secondary sort: strong brand fit (≥70) ranks slightly higher.
order.brandWeak: Secondary sort: weak brand/format fit (<50) ranks slightly lower.
order.timelineTight: Secondary sort: tight timeline (≥70) ranks slightly higher.
order.relationship: Secondary sort: prior brand relationship ranks slightly higher.
order.risk: Secondary sort: higher contract/collab risk (≥50) ranks slightly lower.

plain.footnoteDefaultFloor: Some deliverables weren't on your rate card; we used the default floor. Update your rate card for a tighter estimate.
plain.footnoteNoRateCard: No rate card yet — floor uses the system default. Add your rates for accurate sorting.

breakdownV3.title: Ranking & score breakdown
breakdownV3.dealValueHint: Under v3 rules, headroom vs your combined floor drives value band and list order — not the bars below.
breakdownV3.attentionHint: Brand, timeline, relationship, and risk — budget is excluded.
breakdownV3.defaultFloorHint: Some deliverables used the default floor — update your rate card for a tighter estimate.
breakdownV3.noRateCardHint: No rate card yet — floor uses the system default threshold.

summary.highValueAboveTarget: They quoted {{quoteDisplay}}, above your target rate of {{targetDisplay}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)). This meets your high-value bar and sits near the top of your inbox.
summary.highValueInRange: They quoted {{quoteDisplay}}, which meets your target rate of {{targetDisplay}}. By your rate card, this is worth prioritizing.
summary.inRange: They quoted {{quoteDisplay}}, within your {{floorDisplay}}–{{targetDisplay}} range ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)). Fine to explore, but deals with stronger quotes rank ahead.
summary.belowFloor: They quoted {{quoteDisplay}}, below your floor of {{floorDisplay}}. Consider countering or clarifying scope before committing.
summary.budgetUnknown: No clear quote in the email yet. Ranked behind deals with known budgets — ask for budget first.
summary.noRateCard: You haven't set a rate card yet, so we're estimating from {{floorDisplay}}. Add your rates for more accurate sorting.
summary.rateCardKeyMiss: Some deliverables didn't match your rate card; unmatched items use the default floor of {{defaultFloorDisplay}} each. Update your rate card for a tighter estimate.
summary.multiDeliverable: Quote {{quoteDisplay}} covers {{unitCount}} deliverable(s); expected floor about {{floorDisplay}} combined.
summary.multiplePackagesLead: {{packageCount}} quote options. Inbox ranking uses the option with the most headroom vs your combined floor ({{bestOptionQuoteDisplay}} · {{bestDeliverable}}, {{bestUnitCount}} deliverable(s), {{bestQuoteDisplay}}, {{bestMarginMagnitudeDisplay}} headroom). Each option:
summary.multiplePackagesLeadBelow: {{packageCount}} quote options. All are below your combined floor; ranking uses the smallest shortfall ({{bestOptionQuoteDisplay}} · {{bestDeliverable}}, {{bestUnitCount}} deliverable(s), {{bestQuoteDisplay}}, {{bestMarginMagnitudeDisplay}} below floor). Each option:
summary.multiplePackagesLeadEven: {{packageCount}} quote options. Ranking uses the option closest to your combined floor ({{bestOptionQuoteDisplay}} · {{bestDeliverable}}, {{bestUnitCount}} deliverable(s), {{bestQuoteDisplay}}). Each option:
summary.packageOptionDefault: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor ({{unmatchedCount}} not on rate card — {{defaultFloorDisplay}}/item default), {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} headroom.
summary.packageOptionRanking: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor, {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} headroom — used for inbox ranking.
summary.packageOptionRankingDefault: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor ({{unmatchedCount}} not on rate card — {{defaultFloorDisplay}}/item default), {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} headroom — used for inbox ranking.
summary.packageOptionBelow: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor, {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} below floor.
summary.packageOptionBelowDefault: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor ({{unmatchedCount}} not on rate card — {{defaultFloorDisplay}}/item default), {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} below floor.
summary.packageOptionRankingBelow: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor, {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} below floor — used for inbox ranking.
summary.packageOptionRankingBelowDefault: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor ({{unmatchedCount}} not on rate card — {{defaultFloorDisplay}}/item default), {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} below floor — used for inbox ranking.
summary.packageOptionEven: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor, matches your floor.
summary.packageOptionEvenDefault: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor ({{unmatchedCount}} not on rate card — {{defaultFloorDisplay}}/item default), matches your floor.
summary.packageOptionRankingEven: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor, matches your floor — used for inbox ranking.
summary.packageOptionRankingEvenDefault: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): {{quoteDisplay}} quote, {{floorDisplay}} combined floor ({{unmatchedCount}} not on rate card — {{defaultFloorDisplay}}/item default), matches your floor — used for inbox ranking.
summary.packageQuoteUnknown: {{optionQuoteDisplay}} · {{deliverable}} ({{unitCount}} deliverable(s)): quote unclear — can't estimate yet.

body.marginAboveTarget: Quote {{quoteDisplay}} is {{targetMarginMagnitudeDisplay}} above your target of {{targetDisplay}}.
body.marginInRange: Quote {{quoteDisplay}} sits between your floor {{floorDisplay}} and target {{targetDisplay}}, with {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} headroom vs the floor.
body.marginBelowFloor: Quote {{quoteDisplay}} is {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} below your floor of {{floorDisplay}}.
body.multiDeliverable: {{unitCount}} deliverable(s); your combined floor is about {{floorDisplay}} (~{{perUnitFloorDisplay}} each).
body.multiplePackages: Pick one package before you reply. Ranking uses whichever option has the most headroom vs your combined floor.
body.attentionStrong: Brand, timeline, and relationship are a strong match — this ranks slightly higher among similar deals.
body.attentionModerate: Brand and timeline are an okay match; within this group, quote size matters most.
body.attentionWeak: Brand or timeline is a weaker match — check better-fit deals first.
body.attentionP0: Because of {{urgencyReason}}, handle this today — quote size doesn't change that.
body.queueP1ByMargin: Within this tier, deals sort by headroom vs your floor ({{floorDisplay}}). This one has {{marginMagnitudeDisplay}} headroom — more ranks higher.
body.queueP2InRange: Among "review when you can" deals, stronger quotes rank first.
body.queueP2HighValueLowAttention: (Legacy rule) Good quote, but other signals were weaker.

section.queue: Where it sits in your inbox

urgency.deadline: This thread has a tight timeline — follow up within about 48 hours. That's why it's at the top today, regardless of quote size.
urgency.deadlineWithHint: They mentioned "{{deadlineHint}}" — the timeline is tight, so this sits at the top today regardless of quote size.
urgency.deadlineWithRemaining: The deadline is approaching ({{hoursRemaining}} hours left), so this sits at the top today regardless of quote size.
urgency.deadlineWithHintAndRemaining: They mentioned "{{deadlineHint}}" — {{hoursRemaining}} hours left to follow up, so this sits at the top today regardless of quote size.
urgency.deadlineOverdue: The deadline passed {{daysOverdue}} day(s) ago and still needs action, so this sits at the top today.
urgency.deadlineWithHintOverdue: They mentioned "{{deadlineHint}}" — overdue by {{daysOverdue}} day(s), so this sits at the top today.
urgency.contractDeadlineWithRemaining: The contract or brief has a deadline ({{hoursRemaining}} hours left) and terms that need your review. Read it today before replying.
urgency.contractDeadlineWithHintAndRemaining: The contract or brief mentions "{{deadlineHint}}" with {{hoursRemaining}} hours left, plus terms that need your review. Read it today before replying.
urgency.contractDeadlineOverdue: The contract or brief deadline passed {{daysOverdue}} day(s) ago and terms still need your review. Read it today before replying.
urgency.contractDeadlineWithHintOverdue: The contract or brief mentions "{{deadlineHint}}" — overdue by {{daysOverdue}} day(s) — and terms still need your review. Read it today before replying.
urgency.needsReply: They're waiting for your reply, with activity in the last {{hoursAgo}} hours. Handle this today first.
urgency.contractDeadline: The contract or brief has both a tight timeline and clauses worth reviewing. Read it today before replying.
urgency.generic: This thread has urgent timing or reply expectations, so it's at the top of your inbox today.

creatorVerification.bannerTitle: Verify homepage email to unlock AI inbox
creatorVerification.bannerBody: We compare the public email on your creator homepage with your bound deal inbox. If they match, verification passes automatically—no manual review.
creatorVerification.verifySuccessBody: AI inbox is enabled. Syncing and classifying mail in the background.
creatorVerification.verifySuccessBodyWithBackfill: AI inbox is enabled. Started AI classification for {{count}} earlier message(s)—check back shortly.
creatorVerification.verifyErrorBody: We could not complete email verification. Please try again.
creatorVerification.errorMismatch: Homepage email does not match your bound inbox. Update your homepage contact email to the bound address, then verify again.
creatorVerification.errorHomepageMissing: No public email was found on your homepage. Add your bound inbox email to your homepage profile first.
creatorVerification.errorMailboxRequired: Connect your deal inbox before running email verification.
creatorVerification.errorProfileIncomplete: Complete your creator profile and link a platform homepage first.

basicMailbox.emptyDesc: Sync your mailbox to read raw messages while verification is pending.

inboxScreen.connectionBannerBody: Connect mail to sort brand pitches.
inboxScreen.rateCardMissingTitle: Set a rate card to unlock high-value sorting
inboxScreen.rateCardMissingBody: Without floor rates, deals stay in the follow-up band until you add pricing.
inboxScreen.manualEntryBannerTitle: Add a deal from social DMs
inboxScreen.manualEntryBannerBody: Track brand partnerships from TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and other platforms—without waiting for email.

aiRulesBannerBody.both: LLM is not configured or unavailable. Classification and briefs use keyword rules, so results may be less accurate than AI.
aiRulesBannerBody.classification: LLM is not configured or unavailable. Mail classification uses keyword rules, so categories and value bands may be less accurate.
aiRulesBannerBody.brief: LLM is not configured or unavailable. Brief extraction uses keyword rules, so budget and deliverables may be incomplete.

inboxScreen.addDealBody: Track brand partnerships from social DMs.
inboxScreen.emptyArchivedDesc: Threads without priority land here after sorting.
inboxScreen.syncResultBodyProcessing: AI is still classifying and extracting details. This card will update when processing finishes.
inboxScreen.reclassificationBanner: Updating inbox classification for the new filter…
inboxScreen.syncResultInboxQueued: {{count}} from INBOX queued for AI classification
inboxScreen.syncResultOtherFolderSaved: {{count}} from Sent or other folders saved as raw mail only
inboxScreen.syncResultNoChanges: No new mail needs to enter the inbox
inboxScreen.syncingInline: Syncing. AI is classifying new mail…
inboxScreen.syncProgressBodyDone: Mail processing is complete. New items are updated in the inbox and action list.
inboxScreen.syncProgressBodyFailed: {{failed}} message(s) failed. Try syncing again later.
inboxScreen.syncProgressBodyBriefFailed: {{failed}} brief extraction(s) failed. Classification is still available — try syncing again later.
inboxScreen.descPriority: Start with P0 urgent, then P1 high value and P2 review later.
inboxScreen.descAll: Shows INBOX mail after AI classification; Sent and other folders are saved as raw mail only and are not listed here.
inboxScreen.emptyCommercialDesc: All mail stays classified; this view shows the P0–P2 priority queue, including active escrow delivery.
inboxScreen.emptyPriorityDesc: Urgent, high-value, and review-later threads appear here. Everything else is under Classified mail.
inboxScreen.emptyProcessingDesc: Messages synced before verification are processing in the background. Wait a moment or tap Sync inbox again.
inboxScreen.emptySearchDesc: Try another keyword or clear search.
inboxScreen.mailboxWatchManualSync: Manual sync available (push not configured on server)
inboxScreen.mailboxRetryWritebackA11y: Retry failed native mailbox writeback jobs
inboxScreen.mailboxPushConfigMissing: Push registration is not configured on the server. Use manual sync or configure mailbox webhook settings.

mailboxPushMissingReason.GMAIL_TOPIC_NAME: Configure bioby.mailbox.webhook.gmail-topic-name on the server (GCP Pub/Sub topic for Gmail push).
mailboxPushMissingReason.WEBHOOK_BASE_URL: Configure bioby.mailbox.webhook.base-url on the server (public HTTPS URL for provider webhooks).
mailboxPushMissingReason.PUSH_NOT_SUPPORTED: Provider push notifications are not supported for this mailbox connection.
mailboxPushMissingReason.RECONSENT_REQUIRED: Reconnect the mailbox before registering push notifications.

dealsScreen.filterEmptyDesc: Try another filter or refresh after a new deal moves forward.
dealsScreen.emptyDesc: Confirmed deals land here with escrow tracking.

dealsScreen.panelSourceNotesBody: If the deal record does not include opportunityThreadId, the mail timeline section degrades gracefully and the rest of the panel stays available.

assetsScreen.devMockFailureHint: Next Media Kit refresh fails once for retry demo

draftsScreen.listLead: Review before price, rights, or promises change.
draftsScreen.emptyRowsHint: Drafts from inbox threads appear here.

draftDetail.missingSubtitle: The link may be invalid or outdated.
draftDetail.checkQuoteBody: Check scope and usage before send.
draftDetail.boundarySnippet: Scope note: fees and timing change if deliverables or usage shift.
draftDetail.nativeDraftUpdatedBody: Your native mailbox draft was updated. Continue editing or send from Gmail or Outlook.
draftDetail.nativeDraftBody: Save this approved copy into your native mailbox drafts. It will not send automatically.
draftDetail.nativeDraftApprovalRequired: Tap Confirm to send above before saving to your mailbox.
draftDetail.nativeDraftSyncedBody: Saved to your native mailbox drafts. Edit or send it from Gmail or Outlook.
draftDetail.nativeDraftSentBody: Sent from your native mailbox at {{time}}.
draftDetail.nativeDraftUnavailableBody: Backend API mode is required to write native mailbox drafts.
draftDetail.nativeDraftErrorBody: Could not save this draft to your mailbox.
draftDetail.nativeDraftSendMissingBody: Save to your mailbox before sending the email.
draftDetail.nativeDraftScopeMissingBody: This mailbox connection is missing send permissions. Reconnect Gmail and approve create/read/compose/send access.
draftDetail.nativeDraftSentSyncHint: Inbox sync ran to refresh the thread.
draftDetail.sentQuoteNextBody: Lead stage is now quoted. Go back to the opportunity to confirm terms and create the deal.
draftDetail.sentReplyNextBody: Select OK to return to the email summary. When ready, you can generate and send the quote draft.

mailboxDraftErrors.DRAFT_APPROVAL_REQUIRED: Approve the draft before saving it to your mailbox.
mailboxDraftErrors.MAILBOX_DRAFT_SCOPE_REQUIRED: Mailbox is missing draft write permissions. Reconnect Gmail.
mailboxDraftErrors.MAILBOX_SEND_SCOPE_REQUIRED: Mailbox is missing send permissions. Reconnect Gmail.
mailboxDraftErrors.MAILBOX_DRAFT_WRITEBACK_UNAVAILABLE: Native mailbox drafts are not supported for this connection.
mailboxDraftErrors.REMOTE_DRAFT_ID_MISSING: Save to mailbox drafts before sending.
mailboxDraftErrors.REMOTE_DRAFT_NOT_FOUND: Save this draft to your mailbox before sending.
mailboxDraftErrors.REMOTE_DRAFT_STALE: The Gmail draft no longer exists (it may have been deleted). We tried creating a new one—tap Save to mailbox again if it still fails.
mailboxDraftErrors.PROPOSAL_DRAFT_NOT_SENDABLE: This is a proposal draft and cannot be saved to your mailbox. Open the proposal page to confirm and share it with the brand.

draftDetail.proposalDraftRedirectBody: Proposals must be confirmed and shared via link—they cannot be written to Gmail or Outlook drafts. Opening the proposal page…
draftDetail.composeSectionSubtitle: Review and edit with the thread context above
draftDetail.finalConfirmBody: Confirm price, delivery, and payment language.

paymentsScreen.title: Proof & payouts
paymentsScreen.description: Escrow, proof, and releases in one place.
paymentsScreen.uploadProofHint: Complete proof moves payout to review.
paymentsScreen.reminderHint: Remind after the review window passes.
paymentsScreen.followupAdvice: Upload proof first. Remind only if the brand misses the window.
paymentsScreen.listEmptyDesc: Escrow and settlement activity will show here.

nextMilestone.prepayEscrowedOpenDelivery: Prepay escrowed. Open delivery to start production.
nextMilestone.submitVerificationProof: Submit verification proof to release remaining escrow.
nextMilestone.dealClosedArchivePacket: Deal closed. Archive the packet for your records.
nextMilestone.reviewRemediationOptions: Review remediation options with the brand.
nextMilestone.mediationInProgress: Mediation in progress — hold further delivery changes.
nextMilestone.submitRoughCutByDeadline: Submit rough cut by May 22, 12:00. Review window: 48h.
nextMilestone.addFirstDayMetrics: Add first-day metrics before final verification.
nextMilestone.draftSubmittedWaitingPr: Draft submitted; waiting on PR manager approval.
nextMilestone.prepayLockedStartScript: Prepay locked. Start script draft this week.
nextMilestone.confirmPacketCollectPrepay: Confirm packet and collect 50% prepay before shoot.
nextMilestone.brandReviewingScriptV2: Brand reviewing script v2 — respond by Thursday.
nextMilestone.mediationSparkAds: Mediation: clarify Spark Ads usage vs paid add-on.
nextMilestone.reviewFixesPath: Review fixes: replacement, extension, or refund path.
nextMilestone.dealClosedTaxRecords: Deal closed. Archive packet for tax records.
nextMilestone.scriptUploadedSubmitRough: Script uploaded. Submit rough cut when brand approves.
nextMilestone.brandReviewingRoughCut: Brand is reviewing your rough cut.
nextMilestone.verificationSubmittedBrandReview: Verification submitted. Brand review unlocks balance release.
nextMilestone.brandReviewingVerificationProof: Brand is reviewing verification proof before balance release.

outcomeSummary.termsConfirmedFromBrief: Terms were confirmed from the structured brief.
outcomeSummary.dealSettledArchived: Deal settled. Packet archived for records.
outcomeSummary.recommendedSkincareMatch: High match with your skincare content. Prepay ready to escrow.
outcomeSummary.recommendedOutdoorAudience: Your outdoor audience fits their target demo.
outcomeSummary.deliverThenVerify: Deliver and publish against packet, then move to verification.
outcomeSummary.postLinkNeedsMetrics: Post link submitted. Screenshots and metrics still needed.
outcomeSummary.glowRecipeCreativeBrief: Must mention watermelon extract in first 5 seconds. No competing skincare on screen.
outcomeSummary.ceraveHighValueEscrowed: High-value lead above your rate floor. 50% prepay is in escrow.
outcomeSummary.bloomAwaitingFinance: Terms confirmed from inbox brief. Waiting on brand finance to fund escrow.
outcomeSummary.fitformProductionStarted: Production started. Keep usage limited to organic campaign per packet.
outcomeSummary.petitePartialVerification: Final cut approved. Verification checklist is partially complete.
outcomeSummary.maisonSparkAdsDispute: Brand requested 30-day Spark Ads without separate fee. Dispute open.
outcomeSummary.gammaRemediationInProgress: Remediation in progress. Keep evidence and timeline clean.
outcomeSummary.nordstromAllVerified: All deliverables verified and final payout released.
outcomeSummary.harborGiftDealComplete: Gift-turned-paid deal completed on time with full escrow release.
outcomeSummary.packetTermsPlaceholder: Packet terms will appear here when connected to API.

recommendPayoutNote.fullPrepayBeforeProduction: 100% prepay can be escrowed before production.
recommendPayoutNote.prepayBeforeDates: Prepay required before delivery dates are committed.

recommendRiskNote.claimsReviewRequired: Claims review required. Keep usage limited to campaign scope unless priced separately.
recommendRiskNote.confirmLocationUsage: Confirm location, usage term, and whether brand needs paid social edits.

payoutHint.remainingAfterVerification: Remaining balance releases after verification and brand sign-off.
payoutHint.escrowHoldUntilDispute: Escrow hold until usage dispute resolves.
payoutHint.remainingWithBudget: Remaining balance releases after verification. Budget signal: {{budget}}.

milestoneByPhase.escrowed: Prepay escrowed. Open delivery to start production.
milestoneByPhase.pending_verification: Submit verification proof to release remaining escrow.
milestoneByPhase.settled: Deal closed. Archive the packet for your records.
milestoneByPhase.remediation: Review remediation options with the brand.
milestoneByPhase.disputed: Mediation in progress — hold further delivery changes.

tm-punctual.label: On-time publish

trustPassportScreen.title: Fulfillment record
trustPassportScreen.description: Brands rarely ask for this—they ask for your Media Kit.
trustPassportScreen.repositionTitle: This is not your Media Kit
trustPassportScreen.repositionBody: What creators send brands: channel stats, audience, rate card, past partnerships, and contact. Fulfillment metrics are an optional appendix—not the main pitch.
trustPassportScreen.ctaOpenMediaKitHint: One-page pitch you can share or copy in full
trustPassportScreen.appendixSubtitle: On-time publish, disclosure pass rate—only if you choose to attach
trustPassportScreen.appendixNote: Floor rates, DM screenshots, and open disputes never appear here.
trustPassportScreen.emptyMetricsDesc: Metrics appear here after you complete deals and build delivery history.

disputesScreen.title: Disputes
disputesScreen.organizedTitle: Collect links, screenshots, and clauses first
disputesScreen.emptyDesc: Timing, disclosure, or proof issues appear here.
disputesScreen.resolveDemoBody: Connect the API to resolve disputes.

workspaceSettingsScreen.title: Switch workspace
workspaceSettingsScreen.description: Pick which tenant boundary your session uses. Data reloads after switch.
workspaceSettingsScreen.createSubtitle: Create an isolated workspace for a different persona or type of collaboration.
workspaceSettingsScreen.listSubtitle: Active workspace is highlighted. Pending invites can be accepted here.
workspaceSettingsScreen.empty: No other workspaces on this account yet.

workspaceCreateScreen.title: Create workspace
workspaceCreateScreen.description: Each workspace keeps its collaborations, inbox, creator profile, and settings separate.
workspaceCreateScreen.nameSubtitle: Use the creator name or persona you want to trade as.

teamAcceptScreen.title: Workspace invitation
teamAcceptScreen.invalidLinkBody: Ask the workspace owner to send a new invitation.
teamAcceptScreen.apiRequiredBody: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL to accept workspace invitations.
teamAcceptScreen.signInBody: Use the email address that received this invitation.
teamAcceptScreen.successBody: You joined the workspace. Open Workspace settings to switch into it.
teamAcceptScreen.failedFallback: The invite may have expired or already been used.

teamSettingsScreen.title: Collaborators
teamSettingsScreen.description: Invite an assistant into this workspace. Every member has the same day-to-day access.
teamSettingsScreen.membersSubtitle: The owner, members, and pending invitations for this workspace.
teamSettingsScreen.inviteLead: Invitees join as members and can handle day-to-day work in this workspace.
teamSettingsScreen.inviteInAppBody: They can accept from Settings → Workspace after signing in.
teamSettingsScreen.inviteEmailSuccessBody: They will receive an email to create an account and join your workspace.
teamSettingsScreen.inviteEmailFailedBody: The invite was saved, but the email could not be sent. Ask them to register with this email.
teamSettingsScreen.invitePendingError: An invite is already pending for this email.
teamSettingsScreen.inviteAlreadyMember: This user is already a member.
teamSettingsScreen.ownerOnlyLead: Only the workspace owner can invite or remove collaborators.
teamSettingsScreen.footnote: Every member can handle day-to-day work; only the owner can invite or remove collaborators.

subscriptionSettingsScreen.title: Workspace limits
subscriptionSettingsScreen.cardUpgradeTitle: Upgrade only when you're actually blocked
subscriptionSettingsScreen.upgradeExplain: Near limits? Upgrade keeps AI flowing.
subscriptionSettingsScreen.footerNote: Changes only apply after you confirm.

pricingScreen.title: Rate card
pricingScreen.defaultPackageHintNamed: {{name}} is your default package — AI uses it first when drafting proposals.
pricingScreen.defaultPackageHintNone: No default package yet. Mark one package as default so AI knows your go-to tier.
pricingScreen.whyRulesBody:
1. Inbox sorting requires floor rates to classify collaboration leads by value.
2. AI-drafted quotes require package and usage-rights boundaries as reference.
pricingScreen.aiDraftTitle: AI can draft proposals from your rate card
pricingScreen.aiDraftHint: AI drafts from your card—you approve sends.
pricingScreen.discountTitle: Discounts and usage rights don't auto-ship
pricingScreen.discountHint: Paid media and long licenses need manual OK.
pricingScreen.ctaEditPlatformRatesHint: Set prices per platform and content format
pricingScreen.packagesEmptyBody: Add your first package so AI can sort leads and draft quotes from your floor rates.
pricingScreen.ctaAddPackageHint: Create one package, then return to the list after saving
pricingScreen.reorderFailedBody: We couldn't save the new package order. Please try again.

pricingEditScreen.title: Edit rate card
pricingEditScreen.description: Package prices sync into proposals and Media Kit when sync is on.
pricingEditScreen.descriptionNew: Fill in the package details, then return to the rate card list after saving.
pricingEditScreen.descriptionEdit: Update this package, then return to the rate card list after saving.
pricingEditScreen.missingPackageBody: Choose a package from the rate card list, or create a new one.
pricingEditScreen.packageNotFoundBody: This package may have been removed. Go back to the list and try again.
pricingEditScreen.deleteBlockedBody: Keep at least one package on your rate card.
pricingEditScreen.deleteConfirmBody: 「{{name}}」 will be removed from your rate card. You can add packages again anytime.
pricingEditScreen.priceRangeInvalid: Maximum must be greater than or equal to minimum
pricingEditScreen.deliverableCustomPlaceholder: e.g. store visit series, voiceover + clips
pricingEditScreen.usageRightsHint: Pick one primary scope. “Organic feed” means normal brand-account posting, not paid media boosts.
pricingEditScreen.usageCustomPlaceholder: e.g. brand-owned channels only, no remix rights
pricingEditScreen.placeholderAddOnHint: Paid usage and long licenses quoted separately
pricingEditScreen.recommendedHint: Only one default at a time. AI picks it first when drafting proposals.
pricingEditScreen.saveFailedBody: We couldn't save your rate card. Please try again.
pricingEditScreen.saveBlockedMultipleRecommended: Only one package can be recommended at a time.

proposalDetailScreen.title: Review before send
proposalDetailScreen.rightsNotDefaultTitle: Usage rights aren't included by default
proposalDetailScreen.rightsNotDefaultHint: Paid placements and long licenses are add-ons.
proposalDetailScreen.moneyTermsTitle: Terms that affect money and rights
proposalDetailScreen.creatorSnapshotCtaHint: Edit profile, platforms, and case studies
proposalDetailScreen.draftEditHint: Draft is editable · Saving locks it as your proposal

proposalDetailScreen.saveSuccessDesc: Your edits are saved. You can share when ready.

proposalDetailScreen.shareLinkCopiedDesc: The Proposal share link is on your clipboard.

mediaKitEditScreen.publicPackagesSubtitle: Package details and prices come from Rate Card; choose only what brands can see here

mediaKitEditScreen.ctaPricingHint: The single place to edit package details and prices
mediaKitEditScreen.placeholderInviteCta: Include brief, timeline, and budget range…

battleReportDetailScreen.title: Reuse this win

battleReportDetailScreen.ctaImportMediaKitHint: Adds this report as a case without opening the editor
battleReportDetailScreen.importMediaKitSuccessDesc: Case saved. Open Proposal to see the updated creator snapshot.

dealPacketScreen.title: Deal packet
dealPacketScreen.termDeliverablesValue: 2 vertical videos, 9:16, incl. 2 script revision rounds
dealPacketScreen.termPublishWindowValue: Publish within 3 business days after final approval
dealPacketScreen.termDisclosureValue: Title or pinned comment includes #ad or equivalent disclosure

dealDeliveryScreen.loadFailedDesc: Pull to retry or open the deal overview.
dealDeliveryScreen.title: Awaiting feedback
dealDeliveryScreen.heroTitle: Wait for the feedback window to close before the final cut
dealDeliveryScreen.heroCopy: Wait for the window before final cut.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackAiDraftBody: Reminder draft after the window—you approve send.
dealDeliveryScreen.ruleScopeHint: Back to packet—don't promise extra work.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepBriefNote: Packet locks scope, usage rights, and publish timing.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepRoughNote: Avoid final edit until the feedback window closes.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepFinalNote: After publish, upload link, screenshots, and disclosure proof.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepKickoffNote: Open the packet and confirm deliverables before filming.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepLiveNote: After publish, submit link, screenshots, and disclosure proof.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepIssueNote: Brand can request revisions during the review window.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepReshootNote: Adjust script or reshoot based on brand feedback.
dealDeliveryScreen.stepReleaseNote: Submit verification proof to release remaining escrow.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNotePrepay: Escrow activates after prepay. Upload script → rough → final from the Delivery workspace.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterScript: Script uploaded. Brand review before rough cut.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterScriptAlt: Script uploaded. Submit rough cut when brand approves.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterRough: Rough cut uploaded. Brand has 48h to review.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterRoughReview: Brand is reviewing your rough cut.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteAfterFinal: Final export received. Open verification to submit publish proof.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteVerification: Submit verification proof to release remaining escrow.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteReviewingRoughV1: Brand is reviewing rough cut v1.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNotePrReviewingDraft: PR manager reviewing draft — creative control on hook wording.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteWaitingScriptV2: Waiting on brand feedback for script v2.
dealDeliveryScreen.feedbackNoteTighterProductMention: Brand wants tighter product mention in first 8 seconds.
dealDeliveryScreen.uploadSuccessBody: Delivery timeline updated. Brand can review when applicable.
dealDeliveryScreen.evidenceBrandCopy: Rough cut submitted; one feedback window remains.
dealDeliveryScreen.evidenceDecisionCopy: Approved → final publish. Scope change → packet first.
dealDeliveryScreen.alertReminderBody: Reminder ready—check timing and scope before send.
dealDeliveryScreen.ctaVerificationLockedHint: Upload script → rough → final, then open verification.
dealDeliveryScreen.prepayHero: Escrow must be funded before delivery files count
dealDeliveryScreen.prepayCopy: Return to the deal overview and tap "Record prepay received", then come back here.
dealDeliveryScreen.uploadCopy: Tap each file below in order (script → rough → final). MVP simulates upload—no file picker yet.
dealDeliveryScreen.readyVerificationHero: Final export registered — submit publish proof next
dealDeliveryScreen.readyVerificationCopy: Open verification to submit post link, screenshots, and day-one metrics.
dealDeliveryScreen.demoModeHint: Delivery milestones require the live API workspace. Switch out of local demo or connect the backend.

script.statePending: Not started · share script before filming
script.successBody: Production is in progress. Submit the rough cut when the brand approves the script.
script.guide: Step 1 of 3: register your script draft. Brand reviews before you move to rough cut.

rough.successBody: Brand review window is open. Upload the final export when they approve—or after the window closes.
rough.guide: Step 2 of 3: submit rough cut. Brand gets a 48h review window before final delivery.

final.successBody: Delivery is complete. Open verification to submit publish proof and day-one metrics.
final.guide: Step 3 of 3: register final export, then open verification to submit publish proof.

dealVerificationScreen.loadFailedDesc: Pull to retry or return to the deal overview.
dealVerificationScreen.title: Submit proof
dealVerificationScreen.summarySubmittedCopy: After approval, payouts move to release.
dealVerificationScreen.summaryDraftCopy: Add the publish link, confirm the screenshot, then fill in day-one metrics and a short note to submit.
dealVerificationScreen.screenshotDesc: Include handle, publish time, and disclosure markers.
dealVerificationScreen.foundLinksHint: Complete the evidence fields below to update preflight status.
dealVerificationScreen.confirmBeforeSubmitHint: All proof needs your confirmation prior to submission.
dealVerificationScreen.screenshotAttestLabel: I uploaded a screenshot showing handle, publish time, and disclosure
dealVerificationScreen.checklistBlockedHint: Confirm on-time publish, format/disclosure/usage rights, and compliance before submitting.
dealVerificationScreen.submitBlockedHint: Add a valid publish link (https://), upload proof and confirm the screenshot, and fill day-one metrics plus a note (at least 6 characters each).
dealVerificationScreen.placeholderNote: e.g. disclosure pinned; brand appears in first 5s
dealVerificationScreen.checkFormat: Format, disclosure, and usage rights match packet
dealVerificationScreen.submitErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
dealVerificationScreen.deliveryIncompleteHint: Register script → rough → final on the Delivery screen before submitting proof here.
dealVerificationScreen.approveAlertBody: Brand approved verification and escrow was released.
dealVerificationScreen.approveErrorBody: Submit verification first, then retry brand approval.
dealVerificationScreen.brandReviewPendingHint: Waiting for brand to approve verification before balance release.
dealVerificationScreen.settleAlertBody: Funds marked settled and the opportunity is closed.
dealVerificationScreen.settleErrorBody: Please retry after verification is submitted.

onboardingSync.mailboxConnectEnqueued: Mailbox connected. Recent mail is syncing in the background.
onboardingSync.mailboxBackendBypassed: Backend API is off, so sync was skipped.
onboardingSync.mailboxUpToDate: Mailbox is already up to date.
onboardingSync.mailboxSyncDoneEmpty: Connection saved, but no new messages were found.
onboardingSync.mailboxSyncDone: Sync complete. {{totalNew}} new message(s) found ({{inboxNewCount}} inbox, {{nonInboxNewCount}} sent/other).
onboardingSync.inboxFilterFallback: Could not save inbox filter preference

onboardingProfileScreen.title: Creator profile
onboardingProfileScreen.whyProfileSubtitle: AI matches deals to your channel.
onboardingProfileScreen.placeholderTags: Add tags one at a time

onboardingEmailScreen.title: Connect inbox
onboardingEmailScreen.aiImportsSubtitle: Brand mail becomes tasks. Skip to explore demo.
onboardingEmailScreen.controlHint: Quotes and rights still need you.
onboardingEmailScreen.manualSetupSubtitle: Fallback for providers that require IMAP app passwords.
onboardingEmailScreen.qqAuthHint: Use your QQ Mail authorization code from mail.qq.com settings — not your QQ login password.

onboardingConsentScreen.title: AI boundaries
onboardingConsentScreen.privacyTitle: Allow AI to use collaboration context
onboardingConsentScreen.privacySubtitle: Profile and mail inform budget and risk.
onboardingConsentScreen.modeAssistSubtitle: Low-risk auto-send; quotes and payouts need you.
onboardingConsentScreen.boundaryTitle: Anything touching money or rights always needs you
onboardingConsentScreen.boundaryBody: Quotes, rights, payouts, exclusivity, and disputes stay manual.

onboardingInboxFilterScreen.title: How should we filter your inbox?
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.relaxedSubtitle: Show more collaboration signals even when the brief is incomplete.
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.standardSubtitle: Recommended. Balance real deals and noisy mail.
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.strictSubtitle: Keep unclear budgets and suspicious pitches out of high value.
onboardingInboxFilterScreen.hintBody: You can change this anytime in Account. Manual corrections still override the preset.

onboardingPricingSetupScreen.title: Set your rate card floor
onboardingPricingSetupScreen.whyBody: Without floor rates, commercial leads stay in the follow-up band — it looks like AI mis-sorted them, but pricing is missing.
onboardingPricingSetupScreen.whyHint: Add at least one package with a price range. Inbox sorting uses it immediately after you save.
onboardingPricingSetupScreen.configuredBody: Your rate card is saved. High-value sorting will use your floor rates.
onboardingPricingSetupScreen.skipHint: If you skip, most deals stay in follow-up until you add pricing from Growth → Rate card or the inbox banner.

onboardingCompleteScreen.title: Workspace ready
onboardingCompleteScreen.freeTierLine1: Handle up to 100 brand collaboration emails / month · No card required
onboardingCompleteScreen.aiReachTitle: How far AI can go for you
onboardingCompleteScreen.aiReachAssistCopy: Low-risk auto; money and rights stay with you.
onboardingCompleteScreen.emailConnectedTitle: Inbox is in the AI loop
onboardingCompleteScreen.emailSkippedPrimary: Explore mock opportunities and proposals first.
onboardingCompleteScreen.emailConnectedPrimary: Brand mail sorted by budget, rights, payout, and risk.
onboardingCompleteScreen.rateCardSkippedPrimary: Inbox will keep using the follow-up band until you add floor rates.
onboardingCompleteScreen.rateCardSkippedSecondary: Set it anytime from Growth → Rate card or the inbox banner.
onboardingCompleteScreen.rateCardConfiguredPrimary: Floor rates are saved — high-value sorting is active.
onboardingCompleteScreen.rateCardConfiguredSecondary: Edit packages anytime under Growth → Rate card.

feedbackScreen.lead: Your feedback directly helps improve the beta experience. Do not include email content, passwords, tokens, or attachment details.
feedbackScreen.contentHint: Use at least 10 characters and include what you tried and what you expected.
feedbackScreen.placeholder: For example: Gmail stayed on the loading screen after I connected it…
feedbackScreen.contactAllowed: You may contact me at my registered email for follow-up
feedbackScreen.privacy: We attach your user, workspace, page, client platform, and app version. Email content, passwords, OAuth tokens, and attachments are never collected automatically.
feedbackScreen.successMessage: Thanks for helping us improve. We may follow up by email.
feedbackScreen.errorMessage: Check your connection and try again.

account.inboxFilterApplying: Reclassifying inbox with the new filter…
account.focusSaveErrorFallback: Could not save today queue display mode

summaries.feedback: Tell us what could work better

account.overviewError: Couldn't load account data from the server.

replayConfirm.title: Run setup again?
replayConfirm.message: Clears profile, inbox, and AI prefs on this device. You stay signed in.
replayConfirm.errorBody: We couldn't reset your workspace on the server. Please try again.

verificationPreflight.profileIncompleteMessage: Identity verification needs at least one linked creator platform homepage so we can read your public contact email.
verificationPreflight.mailboxRequiredMessage: Connect your collaboration inbox before starting identity verification.
verificationPreflight.homepageMissingMessage: Add a public contact email on your platform homepage, then come back to verify.
verificationPreflight.homepageMissingMessageWithEmail: Add your bound deal inbox email ({{email}}) as the public contact email on your platform homepage, then come back to verify.
verificationPreflight.emailMismatchMessage: Your homepage email ({{homepageEmail}}) does not match your bound inbox ({{boundEmail}}). Update your homepage contact email to {{boundEmail}}, then verify again.
verificationPreflight.emailMismatchMessageFallback: Your homepage email does not match your bound inbox. Update your homepage contact email to match, then verify again.

replyStyleScreen.lead: How AI sends replies. Applies immediately.
replyStyleScreen.savedNote: Quotes, rights, payouts, and disputes always need approval.

replyTemplatesScreen.title: Reply templates
replyTemplatesScreen.lead: Tap colored info tags to insert AI-filled details into your template.
replyTemplatesScreen.listSubtitle: Tags are filled from the current cooperation when you send.
replyTemplatesScreen.empty: No templates yet. Create one for quote follow-ups or scope clarifications.
replyTemplatesScreen.deleteConfirmBody: "{{name}}" will be removed from this workspace.
replyTemplatesScreen.hint: Up to 20 templates per workspace. Tags use cooperation details extracted by AI.
replyTemplatesScreen.loadFailedBody: Check your connection and try again.

replyTemplateEditScreen.defaultBody: Shown first when inserting from drafts.

opportunityManualScreen.title: Add deal
opportunityManualScreen.lead: Log brand partnerships from TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and other social DMs.
opportunityManualScreen.backendRequired: Manual entry requires a connected backend API.

replyTemplateBodyEditor.helpBody:
Tap a tag to insert a placeholder like 【{{example}}】 at the cursor. It flows inline with your text.

When you send the reply, BioBy replaces each placeholder with details from the current cooperation—brand name, title, deliverables, and other AI-extracted fields.

Backspace removes the whole placeholder. You can also tap × under Inserted tags.

replyTemplatePicker.title: Insert template
replyTemplatePicker.lead: Tap a template to fill the editor. Known fields are filled from this opportunity.
replyTemplatePicker.empty: No templates yet. Add them under Assets → Price & pitch → Reply templates.

replyDraftGenerator.title: AI generate reply
replyDraftGenerator.lead: Combines this opportunity, your rate card, and email scenario into a draft you can edit before send.
replyDraftGenerator.noRateCard: Add a rate card package under Pricing for sharper quotes.
replyDraftGenerator.noTemplate: Add reply templates under Assets → Price & pitch for AI tone reference.

creatorProfileEditor.fetchedStatsHint: Fetched from your profile link. Use Refresh to update.
creatorProfileEditor.summarySubtitle: How brands see you across channels. Edit freely — platform lookups will not overwrite these fields.
creatorProfileEditor.aiGenerateErrorFallback: Try again later or fill in your profile manually.
creatorProfileEditor.aiGenerateEndpointMissing: Creator API is missing the generate-summary endpoint. Rebuild and restart the backend, then try again.
creatorProfileEditor.aiPromptMessageSingle: Bioby AI can aggregate your display name, bio, and tags from the platforms you connected.
creatorProfileEditor.aiPromptMessageMulti: You connected more platforms. Re-aggregate your profile with Bioby AI?
creatorProfileEditor.suggestionSubtitle: Review the suggested fields before adopting. Platform stats stay read-only.
creatorProfileEditor.suggestionLowConfidence: Please double-check this suggestion before adopting.

profileSettingsScreen.lead: How brands see you in drafts and your kit.
profileSettingsScreen.resolveErrorFallback: We could not read this profile yet.
profileSettingsScreen.saveSuccessBody: Your creator profile has been updated.
profileSettingsScreen.saveFailedBody: Check your connection and try again.

dataExportScreen.lead: Export workspace data or open financial records.
dataExportScreen.footer: Payments and disputes open in their own screens.

rows.pipelineSubtitle: Brand, stage, budget, and core fields

workspaceExport.failedMessage: Could not download the workspace JSON. Check your connection and try again.

inboxAlert.title: Included in workspace export
inboxAlert.message: Opportunity metadata and summaries are included in the workspace JSON export. Full mailbox bodies are not exported.

pipelineExport.failedMessage: Could not download the pipeline CSV. Check your connection and try again.

deleteAccount.heading: Privacy & deletion
deleteAccount.title: Delete account and data
deleteAccount.body: Your account will be disabled immediately. Personal workspace data is permanently removed after a {{days}}-day cooling period.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This disables your account now and schedules permanent data deletion after {{days}} days. You will be signed out.
deleteAccount.successMessage: Your account is disabled. Data will be permanently removed after the {{days}}-day cooling period.
deleteAccount.successMessageScheduled: Your account is disabled. Data is scheduled for permanent deletion on {{date}}.
deleteAccount.failedMessage: Try again in a moment or contact support.
deleteAccount.alreadyRequested: Account deletion has already been requested.
deleteAccount.pendingBanner: Account deletion is pending. Data will be permanently removed after the {{days}}-day cooling period.
deleteAccount.pendingBannerScheduled: Account deletion is pending. Data is scheduled for permanent removal on {{date}}.
